items.value: Outside Box
A whole outside generated literally outside the school, with circular windows.
Hanging Long Light
A variation of the hanging light that usually appears in Bathrooms.
Super Fan
Mark a spot for a Super Fan to spawn in a direction in order to use the Super Fans event.
Event Machine
Add an Event Machine that stops an event when a screwdriver is used on it.
Small Door
A door where small people can go through.
Metal Window
A metal window that, even though it is not a door, it can be opened by screwdrivers!
Classic Window
We've seen this somewhere in a classic version of this game...
Round Window
A completely unbreakable window. Usually, you'd see these facing the outside of the school.
Squisher
A machine that squishes people automatically.
Squisher with Button
A machine that squishes people automatically (with button to force squishing).
Security Camera
They automatically trigger when a rule breaker is, well, breaking the rules on its watch.
Random Trapdoor
Add Trapdoors that let you into random places.
Linked Trapdoor
Add Trapdoors that are linked to each other.
Notebook Machine
Insert this inside a notebook tile to make it battery-powered.
Item Alarm
Insert this inside an item cell to make it trigger when the item is collected.
Duct
It'll pass infinitely hot gas through its connected ducts.
Duct (Connect)
Select a Duct to connect to another Duct; that way, you create a net of them.
The Lab Button
What is this?
Bathroom
A room with toilets, sinks, and stalls. Some NPCs may enter here for no apparent reason.
Abandoned Room
An old, dusty room that hasn't been used in years. It may hide mysterious secrets.
Computer Room
Filled with computers and screens. A perfect spot for nerds and hackers alike.
Coach Dribble's Small Gym
A sporty room with basketball hoops and court lines for practicing your dribbles!
Kitchen
Where Chef Joe cooks up his famous dishes! Watch out for flying pans.
Super Mystery Room
An advanced version of the Mystery Room, colored red and even stranger!
Focus Room
A quiet area where students can focus without interruptions. Or so they think.
Exhibition Room
A room full of curiosities and objects on display. Don’t touch anything shiny!
Snowy Playground
A snowy version of the classic outside!
Ice Rink
An icy place to slide on and fall on water holes.
Forest Area
A forest place to remind that the old Field Trip and make everything dark on sight!
Basket Ball Court
A very tall court where you can put basketball machines!
Full stall
Insert a full stall for your bathroom, it's way easier with this tool.
Used to break walls, destroy barriers, or fix something... maybe.
Gives a random item when opened! Just hope it’s not coal.
Sticky gum! You can throw it to slow NPCs or make a mess.
Ring it to attract nearby NPCs or get Baldi’s attention!
Temporarily removes dizziness effects. Take responsibly.
Shows everyone's current position on the map.
A shiny golden version of the quarter. Worth more? Not really.
Drink this and your stamina will be supercharged.
Increases your speed for a short time.
Can be used to... stab things.
Restores full stamina when drunk.
Can be used to be filled up.
Jump endlessly! Great for skipping and bouncing over everyone!.
Stops anything that steps on it. Including you.
Can be thrown to bounce and hit things around.
Restores stamina and warms you up in cold events.
Remote control that toggles certain interactable objects.
Used for unscrewing vents or tampering with machines.
Protects you from falling objects or Baldi’s ruler swings!
A collectible symbol of TIME itself! Or just decoration.
A cherry-flavored BSODA. Same push power, better taste.
Slippery soap! Drops that make others slip and fall.
Useless... unless you find a furnace.
A mysterious item used to divide something. Or nothing.
Blows strong air to push light objects or dry wet ones.
Makes a loud honk that startles everyone nearby.
Attracts metallic objects or items from a distance.
Throw it to instantly teleport to where it lands.
A sugary variant of the Zesty Bar! Restores 300% stamina.
Smells terrible... maybe you can use it to distract someone.
Slippery soap! Drops that make others slip and fall.
A Grape variant of BSODA that the more people get in, the more it slwos down.
Releases bees when used! Maybe don’t shake it.
A super camera flash that stuns NPCs for a few seconds.
Lets you grab distant objects or pull yourself forward.
Essential in the Bathroom. Can also be thrown against people!
Crumpled paper that can be thrown as a small distraction.
A terrible photo that makes anyone who sees it uncomfortable.
Spin to win! Or fly away aimlessly
Can be used to bonk people.
Conducts electricity. Great for short-circuiting the floor (duh).
Keeps a door open. Simple yet effective!
Releases a mini thunderstorm when opened!
Chocolate that gives you YTPs too.
A YTP that fills up your stamina.
Worth 9999999 YTPs.
A giant tooth. Ew. Might have special use agaisnt everyone.
Can clean dirty objects or items.
Can clean dirty objects or items.
Baldi’s personal yearbook! Might contain secrets.
Cools you down and reduces fire effects.
A huge, bouncy jello that jiggles and can trap NPCs.
Contains doodles and secrets from Baldi’s school.
Launch it to cause a loud explosion and scare everyone!
Shoots small items forward at high speed.
Makes Baldi happy for a short while. Keep it up!
A screaming tomato. Why does it scream?
Lets you glide on icy floors like a pro!
Bath Stall
A bathroom stall. Provides privacy and maybe a hiding spot.
Bath Door
A bathroom door. Opens and closes like a regular one.
Sink
Wash your hands here! Hygiene is important.
Toilet
Flush it for fun. Nothing else happens... right?
Basket Hoop
Basketball hoop! Combine with basketballs for fun!
Basketball Pile
Can be thrown to bounce and hit things around.
Grand Stand
A stand where fans can cheer from! If there were any...
Basket Machine
Throw a bunch of basketballs by itself.
Big Court Line
Marks the edge of a basketball court.
Fancy Computer Table
A sleek, modern table for computers.
Computer Billboard
Displays computer-related advertisements or images (SOON).
Straight Run Line
A straight track line for running courses.
Curved Run Line
A curved line for track fields or decorations.
Forest Tree
A tall forest tree. Common in forest areas.
Campfire
A warm fire pit for outdoor gatherings.
Beartrap
Stops anything that steps on it. Including you.
Kitchen Cabinet
Where Chef Joe cooks up his famous dishes!
Chef Joe
It’s Joe! He’s the chef in the kitchen, always busy.
Focused Student
A student so focused they won’t move until disturbed.
Teleporter
A teleporter device that sends you to another random teleporter device.
Dust Shroom
A mushroom that emits dust when touched.
Sensitive Vase
Breaks if anyone runs nearby! Handle with care.
Item Descriptor
Displays the description of Times-themed items.
Snowy Playground Tree
A snow-covered tree found in winter playgrounds.
Snow Pile
A pile of snow that may hide items.
Snow Shovel
A shovel that uncovers snow piles.
Mystery Tresent Maker 101
Produces random mysterious presents!
Metal Fence
A metallic fence for outdoor zones.
Secret Bread
A mysterious loaf of bread hidden for unknown reasons.
Kitchen Steak
A delicious [uneteable] steak.
Joe Sign
A sign with Joe’s face on it. Promotes his restaurant.
Outside Flower #1
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Outside Flower #2
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Outside Flower #3
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Outside Flower #4
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Outside Flower #5
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Outside Flower #6
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Outside Flower #7
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Outside Flower #8
A simple decorative flower found outside.
Corner Lamp #1
A lamp that fits neatly into room corners.
Corner Lamp #2
A lamp that fits neatly into room corners.
Corner Lamp #3
A lamp that fits neatly into room corners.
Corner Lamp #4
A lamp that fits neatly into room corners.

Principal Out
Principal will be redirected to an office and completely ignore any rule break or punishments.
Frozen Event The whole school goes into a cold state. Everybody struggles to move, and there are obstacles in the way.

Curtains Closed
The new technological noise-blocking curtains are closed in the hallways. You cannot hear the other side!

Skateboard Day
Everyone start rolling down with skateboards. Your movement definitely won't be the best, but it's cool.
Earthquake Everybody goes shaking like dancing due to the obvious earthquake.

Super Fans
Super Fans are toggled on and they act as fixed Cloudy Copters: with a refreshing air.

Lighting Event
A storm makes the whole school go gray. Lighting may struck some places, making it harder to move.
Super Mystery Room An enhanced Mystery Room event. Nothing new aside from being red.

Hologram Past
A bunch of "hologram" clones appears in everybody's position, making everything more confusing.

Nature Event
A bunch of grass appear everywhere and flowers come outside to affect veryone around.
